description_long: This lamppost features a robust, industrial design with a tall, cylindrical pole that is segmented and reinforced with green and black bands. At the top, it supports two large, octagonal lamp heads with a sandy tan color, each positioned symmetrically on either side of the central support. The lamp heads have a faceted, geometric appearance, giving them a modern and utilitarian look suitable for urban environments. The pole appears to be made of metal, likely steel, with visible texturing and ribbing for added strength and grip. The lamp heads are likely constructed from a combination of metal and durable plastic or glass for the light diffusers. There are no visible decorative elements or attachments, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
description: A tall, industrial-style lamppost with two large, faceted tan lamp heads mounted on a segmented green and black metal pole. The design is modern and utilitarian, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view shows a single tan lamp head facing forward, with the pole extending downward and no visible side lamp.
description_view_1: Side view reveals both tan octagonal lamp heads extending outward from the central pole, highlighting the symmetrical dual-head design.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back of a single lamp head and the pole, with no side lamp visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again displays both tan lamp heads, confirming the dual-head configuration.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Faceted octagonal modern lamp heads with a sandy tan finish and geometric styling
